description:
SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS,
Android and desktop apps 📱!

Unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX has no identifiers assigned to the users - it does not use phone
numbers (like Signal or WhatsApp), domain-based addresses (like email, XMPP or Matrix), usernames (like Telegram),
public keys or even random numbers (like all other messengers) to identify its users - we do not even know how many
people use SimpleX.
New in 6.5.2:
- allow deleting messages from channel history without time limit.
- support adding and removing chat relays in channels on the subscriber side (will be enabled in UI in v6.5.x or v7).
Commits:
- flatpak: update metainfo (#6943)
- website: tweaks (#6945)
- support bot, bots: paginate chat scan (#6935)
- ios: fix link chat item not fitting into screen width (#6947)
- website: update home page (#6948)
- ui: adjust create channel ui (#6950)
- core, ui: relay management - add, remove relays, synchronization to relay list (#6917)
- ui: disable relay management (#6951)
- docs: channel subscriber profiles plan (#6918)
- core: single relay checks interval (#6952)
- desktop: fix RTL text rendering under the send button (#6906)
- desktop: fix copying selected text in reports (#6863)
- android, desktop: open correct image in fullscreen viewer (#6869)
- desktop: keep text selection on the originally selected message when a new message arrives (#6955)
- core: code style
- support bot: accept YAML transcript in context (#6946)
- core: forward compatible support for owners/admins/moderations deleting channel and public group messages without limitations (#6962)
- docs: changelog (#6960)
- support bot, simplex-chat-nodejs: fix bot command parsing (#6964)
- core: keep whitelisted query parameters when removing link tracking (#6965)
- desktop: pick a free port for the call server if 50395 is in use (#6963)
- simplex-chat-python: add python library (#6954)
- core: announce added relay (#6956)
- simplex-chat-python: don't log routine async chat errors as ERROR (#6971)
- android, desktop: constrain image height in layout (#6959)
- support bot: escalate to team when Grok's reply contains /team (#6968)
- desktop: add tray support (#6970)
- simplex-support-bot: bump grok model (#6975)
- core, ui: allow indefinite deletion from history for public channel/group owners/moderators (#6972)
- android, desktop: hide private notes from share channel picker; hide share via chat on plain groups (#6958)
- core: include trailing "_" and "!" characters in links (#6973)
- simplex-chat-python: split Client from Bot, add request/response API (#6976)
- core: 6.5.2.0
- ios: hide private notes from share channel picker (#6980)
- ios: update core library
- 6.5.2: ios 332
- 6.5.2: android 349, desktop 143
